title: PRISMA-P 2015 Compliance Checklist — Maternal Prenatal Stress and Its Neuropsychological Sequelae in Infants and Mother–Infant Dyadic Quality: A Systematic Review and Meta-Analysis Protocol
author: Salmerón Vega, Vanesa María
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-zero
description: Completed PRISMA-P 2015 checklist for the systematic review and meta-analysis protocol "Maternal Prenatal Stress and Its Neuropsychological Sequelae in Infants and Mother–Infant Dyadic Quality". This checklist maps each PRISMA-P reporting item to its location in the protocol manuscript submitted to Open Research Europe. License: CC0 1.0 Universal.
